title: GlobalState
description: The centralized state memory for the entire Multi-Agent execution lifecycle, inspired by LangGraph's TypedDict State. Includes execution_limits for anti-hang circuit breaker enforcement.

trace_id.description: Unique UUID for the current execution trace.

status.description: Global execution status. 'blocked' means a circuit breaker fired or artifacts are missing. 'paused_for_human' means HITL gate is active — all autonomous execution halts.

current_stage.description: The macro-stage the system is currently in. Only A00 (Supervisor) is allowed to mutate this field.

active_agents.description: Agents currently holding the execution token.

artifacts_map.description: Pointer references (file paths or URIs) to all strictly typed JSON/YAML artifacts generated across the lifecycle. All keys are nullable — null indicates the artifact has not yet been produced.

prd.description: Path to PRD document produced by A01. Required before architecture gate.

api_spec.description: Path to OpenAPI/GraphQL spec produced by A02. Required before implementation.

db_schema.description: Path to DB schema/ERD produced by A02 + A05. Required before implementation.

backend_plan.description: Path to backend task cards / source code produced by A03.

frontend_plan.description: Path to frontend task cards / component map produced by A04.

test_plan.description: Path to test strategy matrix produced by A06. Required before security gate.

security_report.description: Path to security findings report produced by A07. Required before delivery gate.

devops_configs.description: Path to CI/CD YAML + Dockerfile configs produced by A08. Required before review gate.

observability_plan.description: Path to SLI/SLO + alerting plan produced by A09. Required before knowledge_close.

code_review_report.description: Path to code review report produced by A10. Required before knowledge_close.

errors.description: Track all blocking errors, timeout events, and circuit breaker triggers causing route-backs or failures.

error_code.description: Machine-readable error classification for automated routing decisions.

patch_strategy.description: The reflexion strategy proposed to fix the error. REQUIRED when severity is P0 or P1. Must describe root cause + exact fix approach before code is rewritten.

retry_count.description: How many times this operation has been attempted. When retry_count reaches 3, circuit breaker fires permanently for this operation.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the error was recorded.

execution_limits.description: Circuit breaker and execution budget configuration. Enforced by A00 Supervisor to prevent runaway loops and terminal hangs.

max_agent_steps.description: Maximum total SOP steps across all agents before A00 halts the trace and escalates to User. Inspired by LangGraph's recursion_limit.

max_retries_per_operation.description: Maximum retry attempts for any single terminal command or skill invocation. On breach, circuit breaker fires. Backoff: 2s → 4s → STOP.

global_timeout_seconds.description: Maximum wall-clock seconds for the entire trace execution before A00 auto-fails the run.

agent_step_count.description: Current count of completed agent SOP steps. Incremented by A00 on each handoff. Read-only for implementation agents.

trace_started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the trace was initialized. Used to compute wall-clock elapsed time.
